de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class AbstractTermTransformer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractTermTransformer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, TermTransformer, Sorted
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AddCast, ArrayBaseInstanceOf, ConstantValue, DivideLCRMonomials, DivideMonomials, EnumConstantValue, ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct, IntroAtPreDefsOp, MemberPVToField, MetaAdd, MetaArithBitMaskOp, MetaDiv, MetaEqual, MetaGeq, MetaGreater, MetaLeq, MetaLess, MetaMul, MetaPow, MetaShift, MetaSub

    public abstract class AbstractTermTransformer
extends AbstractSortedOperator
implements TermTransformer
    Abstract class factoring out commonalities of typical term transformer implementations. The available singletons of term transformers are kept here.
